summary: Plastic shell steel blade tape measure for wholesale, hardware retail, and private-label tool programs, with clear blade markings, OEM logo options, and export-ready packaging.
targetBuyers: Hardware importers, retail tool distributors, construction tool wholesalers, value-focused private-label brands, and general tool suppliers
sellingPoints: Cost-effective plastic case with steel blade for everyday measuring work
Metric, inch, or dual-unit blade options for different destination markets
OEM logo, shell color, barcode label, and packaging customization

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Steel measuring blade, plastic case, metal hook, belt clip, optional strap

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Case logo, brand color, blade unit system, packaging artwork, barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, blister card, display box, hang card, or bulk carton

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: To be confirmed by tape length, shell color, packaging style, and order quantity

specs.label: OEM Service
specs.value: Logo file review, packaging artwork check, sample confirmation, and repeat-order support

title: Plastic Shell Steel Blade Tape Measure
quality: Blade coating, number printing, and measurement readability inspection
Retraction, lock, hook, and belt clip function test
Plastic case appearance, color consistency, and assembly review
Packaging quantity, barcode label, and carton condition check
